background: An electric network has $N$ relays. If a relay is tripped the repair time is a random variable that obeys the exponential distribution with constant failure rate parameter $\lambda=19 / \mathrm{h}$. If one repair man is available and ten relays have tripped simultaneously.

task.query: What is the probability that power failure will last more than $\frac{3}{4} \mathrm{~h}$?
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 2: Distribution Functions and Its Applications
